official_platform_snapshots.status: paper-linked official source; fetched response is a JavaScript application shell and exposes no benchmark task, rubric, judge, result, contributor, or license records in static HTML
paper-linked official source; fetched response is a JavaScript application shell and does not preserve auditable leaderboard records in static HTML

unverified_release_leads.status: not verified as author-owned or ByteDance-owned; personal GitHub account, no GitHub organization, no repository license; archive contains only README, static project page, CSS, and images and explicitly says evaluation code is absent

not verified as author-owned or ByteDance-owned; unverified three-member Hugging Face organization; dataset revision contains only .gitattributes and a 30-byte CC-BY-4.0 metadata README, with no task or evaluation data

ownership_boundary: The immutable v4 paper links only the ByteDance Xpert platform and leaderboard. It does not link the GitHub repository or Hugging Face namespace. The GitHub repository links the Hugging Face namespace, but its owner/committer identity is not in the v4 paper author/contributor list and the repository is not under a ByteDance organization. Therefore both are preserved only as inspected, unverified release leads and are not used as official benchmark implementation evidence.
version_boundary: The GitHub and Hugging Face revisions are dated 2026-04-12, after immutable v1 (2026-03-27) and before immutable v4 (2026-04-21). The static project's citation omits contributors added in v4, consistent with a pre-v4 page, but this timing does not establish official ownership or exact paper-time implementation.
redistribution_note: The unverified GitHub snapshot has no repository license. Its archive is retained for source audit only. The empty Hugging Face dataset card declares CC-BY-4.0 but contains no benchmark records.
